message:
fix(messaging): use CAS for producer close and hold lock across consumer rebalance

KafkaProducer:
- Replace load+store close pattern with compare_exchange to prevent
  concurrent double-flush races where two callers could both pass the
  closed check and flush simultaneously
- Fix test topic contamination: use unique topic name in
  deterministic-delivery-metadata test to avoid cross-test interference
  via the global STUB_DELIVERY_OFFSETS static

KafkaConsumer:
- Hold state lock across both validation and mutation in rebalance() to
  prevent TOCTOU race where subscribed_topics could change between the
  subscription check and the partition assignment update
- Remove intermediate lock release that created a window for concurrent
  subscribe/unsubscribe to invalidate the validated assignments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
